Department for Work and Pensions
Universal Credit Service Centre
PO Box 196, Sheffield, S98 1AA

10 March 2026

Dear Mr. [Redacted],

IMPORTANT: YOUR UNIVERSAL CREDIT CLAIM — ACTION REQUIRED BY 31 MARCH 2026

We are writing to inform you that your Universal Credit claim is under review. We need you to provide evidence of your current housing costs and employment status.

You must submit the following documents by 31 March 2026:
- Proof of current address (tenancy agreement or utility bill dated within 3 months)
- Bank statements for the last 3 months
- Evidence of any employment or self-employment income

If we do not receive this information by the deadline, your Universal Credit payments may be suspended with immediate effect.

You can submit documents online via your Universal Credit journal, by post to the address above, or by calling 0800 328 5644.

If you disagree with this decision, you have the right to request a mandatory reconsideration within one month of this letter.

Yours sincerely,
Universal Credit Service Team
Department for Work and Pensions
